name: dota-bot
description: Production-ready Discord bot for Dota 2 matchmaking.

scripts.ops:health:web: node -e "fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health').then((response) => response.text().then((body) => { if (!response.ok) { console.error(body); process.exit(1); } console.log(body); })).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.ops:health:bot: node -e "fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3001/health').then((response) => response.text().then((body) => { if (!response.ok) { console.error(body); process.exit(1); } console.log(body); })).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
